units.title: Unit 1: Introduction
topics: Sorting in Linear Time (Counting sort, Radix Sort, Bucket Sort)
Disjoint Set operations, Linked List representation, Disjoint set forests

units.title: Unit 2: Approach
topics: General Greedy approach Vs Dynamic Programming approach
Case studies: Knapsack problem, Huffman Coding Problem

units.title: Unit 3: Graphs
topics: Representation of Graphs, Breadth First Search, Depth First Search
All pair shortest path, Floyd Warshall Algorithm

units.title: Unit 1: Introduction to Database System
topics: Data Independence, Advantages and Disadvantages of DBMS

units.title: Unit 2: E-R modeling Data Base Design
topics: E-R model: Basic concepts, Design Issues, Mapping Constraints
Attributes and Entity sets, Relationships and Relationship sets
Keys, Entity-Relationship Diagram, Weak Entity Sets
Extended E-R features, Generalization and Aggregation

units.title: Unit 3: Relational Model & SQL
topics: Structure of Relational Databases, Relational Algebra, Relational Calculus
Form of Basic SQL Query, Nested Queries
Logical operators, Outer Joins, Complex Integrity Constraints in SQL

units.title: Unit 4: Database Design Concepts
topics: Schema refinement, Different anomalies in designing a Database
Lossless join decomposition, Dependency preserving Decomposition

units.title: Unit A: Introduction to Version Control and Git Basics
topics: What is Version Control? Centralized vs. Distributed VCS
Overview of Git, Installing Git, Git Configuration
Git Workflow Basics, initializing a Repository
Checking Status and Logs, Viewing History and Differences

units.title: Unit B: Branching, Merging, and Conflict Resolution
topics: Creating and Switching Branches, Viewing Branches
Merging Branches, Fast-forward and Three-way Merge

units.title: Unit C: Remote Repositories and GitHub Basics
topics: What is GitHub? Creating GitHub Account
Repositories on GitHub, Pushing to GitHub
Cloning and Forking Repositories, Pulling Updates
Using .gitignore and README files, GitHub Pages Basics

units.title: Unit D: Collaboration and Real-World GitHub Workflows
topics: Pull Requests: Creating, Reviewing, and Merging
Issue Tracking and Labels, Milestones and Projects
Repository Insights and Metrics, Real-world Use Cases
Mini Projects: Collaborative Repositories, Project Management using GitHub

units.title: Unit 1: Introduction to Python Programming
topics: Python Overview: History, Design Philosophy, and Use Cases
Setting Up Python: Installation and Development Environment
Basic Syntax: Variables, Data Types, Operators, and Expressions
Control Structures: Conditional Statements and Loops
Functions and Modules: Creating and Importing Functions
Python Standard Library: Overview of Common Modules

units.title: Unit 2: Data Structures, File I/O, and Exception Handling
topics: Lists, Tuples, and Dictionaries: Collection Data Types in Python
File Input and Output: Reading and Writing Files
Exception Handling: Handling Errors and Exceptions

units.title: Unit 4: Python Libraries and Applications
topics: Python Libraries for Web Development (e.g., Flask, Django)
Python Libraries for Data Science (e.g., NumPy, pandas, Matplotlib)
Introduction to Database Access with Python
Building Simple Web Applications with Python
Overview of Python Frameworks and Tools (e.g., Django, Jupyter Notebook)
